descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Abbotsford Falcons 11-1 with McFarlane scoring five goals and adding an assist.
descriptionLong: Nanaimo Daily News column reporting on B.C. Junior Hockey League activity. Richmond Sockeyes trounced visiting Abbotsford Falcons 11-1, with Brian McFarlane scoring five goals and an assist, and Barry Kress adding three goals and two assists. The Sockeyes held period leads of 1-0 and 4-0. Column also features notes on junior alumni playing college hockey, including Steve Tuttle of Richmond Sockeyes tied for sixth in WCHA scoring with 12 goals and 20 points for Wisconsin Badgers.

attribution.headline: Notes and quotes from around the B.C. Junior Hockey League
